config.script:
"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: Check if user is logged or not if not then navigate to login page. 
	"""
	try:
	#start of try block
		#Check if user is logged or not if not then navigate to login page
		previousPage = self.session.custom.IsLoggedIn
		if not previousPage:
			system.perspective.print("New Session")
			system.perspective.navigate('/')
		else:
			#NamedQueryPath
			queryPath = 'Project_VECV/Order/getRoleName'
			
			#NamedQuery Params
			queryParams = {"roleID":self.session.custom.UserRoleID}
			dataset = system.db.runNamedQuery(queryPath,queryParams)
			for data in dataset:
				result = data['RoleName']
			self.getChild("root").custom.RoleName = result
			self.getChild("root").getChild("TabContainer").getChild("cntCreated").getChild("tblCreatedOrders").custom.selectedId = []
			self.getChild("root").getChild("TabContainer").getChild("cntSequenced").getChild("tblOrder").custom.selectedId = []
			self.getChild("root").getChild("TabContainer").getChild("cntHold").getChild("tblHold").custom.selectedId = []
			self.getChild("root").getChild("TabContainer").props.currentTabIndex=0
#			system.perspective.sendMessage('UpdateButtons')
	#End of try block		
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Order Management'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Order/OrderManagement')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onStartup  -> Order Management')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

"""
		Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
		Written Date: 27/06/2024
		Purpose: Commit values in table. 
	"""
	#Start of try block	
	try:
		system.perspective.print("edit cell event--Order Sequencing")
		# Get the updated value from the edit commit event
		newValue = event.value
		
		# Get the row index and column name
		rowIndex = event.row
		columnName = event.column
		
		# Ensure the column being edited is "Special Instruction"
		if columnName == "Special Instruction":
		    # Get the table data
		    tableData = self.props.data
		
		    # Convert the table data to a PyDataSet for easier manipulation
		    pyData = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(tableData)
		    
		    # Extract the id from the edited row
		    Id = pyData[rowIndex]["id"]
		    # Update the custom property with the new value
#		    self.custom.specialInstruction = newValue
		
		    # Print the updated value to verify
		    system.perspective.print('edit cell commit: ' + str(newValue)+' id '+str(Id))
	        # Define the parameters for the named query
	        params = {"Id": Id, "SpecialInstruction": newValue}
	    
	        # Execute the named query to update the database
	        system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Order/updateSpecialInstruction", params)
	        system.perspective.sendMessage('refreshSequencedOrders')
	        #self.getSibling("save").props.enabled = True
	#End of try block		
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Order Management'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Order/OrderManagement')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onEditCellCommit -> tbl')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: Select/Deselect orders upon click for further actions. 
	"""
	try:
		rowIndex = event.row 
		selectedColumn = self.props.selection.selectedColumn
		selection = self.custom.selection 
		ctrlDown = self.custom.ctrlDown
		
		columnDictObjects =  Project_VECV.Configuration.Order.getColumnDictObjects()
		
		selected = columnDictObjects["selected"]
		notSelected = columnDictObjects["notSelected"]	
		selectDisabled = columnDictObjects["selectDisabled"]
		
		newData = self.props.data
		if selectedColumn == "selected" or ctrlDown:
			selectedValue = newData.getValueAt(rowIndex, "selected")
			group = newData.getValueAt(rowIndex, "group")
			
			if not selectedValue["enabled"]:
				pass
			
			elif rowIndex not in selection: # add to selection
				newSelection = []
				for row in range(self.props.data.getRowCount()):
					if self.props.data.getValueAt(row, "group") == group:
						if row == rowIndex or group is not None:
							newSelection.append(row)
							newData = system.dataset.setValue(newData, row, "selected", selected)
					else:
						newData = system.dataset.setValue(newData, row, "selected", selectDisabled)
						
				self.props.data = newData
			
			else: # remove from selection
				for row in sorted(selection, reverse=True):
					if row == rowIndex:
						newData = system.dataset.setValue(newData, row, "selected", notSelected)
					
					elif self.props.data.getValueAt(row, "group") == group and group is not None:
						newData = system.dataset.setValue(newData, row, "selected", notSelected)
						
					
				self.props.data = newData	
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Order Management'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Order/OrderManagement')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:rowclick -> tbl')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)
system.perspective.sendMessage('UpdateButtons')

system.perspective.sendMessage('UpdateButtons')
#	self.props.data = self.parent.custom.tableData

try:
		
		if self.custom.refresh == True:
			self.refreshBinding("custom.tableData")
		columnDictObjects = Project_VECV.Configuration.Order.getColumnDictObjects()
		selected = columnDictObjects["selected"]
		notSelected = columnDictObjects["notSelected"]
		selectDisabled = columnDictObjects["selectDisabled"]
		
		headers = system.dataset.getColumnHeaders(value)
		rows = []
		for row in range(value.getRowCount()):
			group = None
			status = value.getValueAt(row, 'Status')
			if str(status) == 'Freezed':
				newRow = [notSelected, group]
			else: 
				newRow = [selectDisabled, group]
			for column in headers:
				newRow.append(value.getValueAt(row, column))
			rows.append(newRow)
		
		headers = ["selected", "group"] + headers
		return system.dataset.toDataSet(headers, rows)
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Order Management/cntSequenced'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Order/OrderManagement')  
		errorFunction = str('tbl.data.binding  -> ')  
		errorType=str('Application')

		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

"""

"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: Update buttons on screen. 
	"""
	try:
		allRowsData = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(self.props.data)
		# Initialize flags to track if any row has 'Freezed' status
		hasFreezed = False
#		system.perspective.print(str(self.props.data))
		# Iterate through the dataset
		for row in range(len(allRowsData)):
			if str(allRowsData[row]['Status']) == 'Freezed':
				hasFreezed = True
				system.perspective.print(str(hasFreezed))
				break
		if hasFreezed == True:
			self.parent.getChild("cntButton").getChild("btnFreeze").props.text = 'UnLock'
		else:
			self.parent.getChild("cntButton").getChild("btnFreeze").props.text = 'Lock'
		# Enable or disable buttons based on the 'Freezed' status
#		self.getSibling("btnUp").props.enabled = hasFreezed
#		self.getSibling("btnDown").props.enabled = hasFreezed
#		self.getSibling("btnTop").props.enabled = hasFreezed
#		self.getSibling("btnBottom").props.enabled = hasFreezed
#		self.getSibling("btnSave").props.enabled = hasFreezed
#		self.getSibling("btnHold").props.enabled = hasFreezed
		self.parent.getChild("cntButton").getChild("btnUp").props.enabled = hasFreezed
		self.parent.getChild("cntButton").getChild("btnDown").props.enabled = hasFreezed
		self.parent.getChild("cntButton").getChild("btnTop").props.enabled = hasFreezed
		self.parent.getChild("cntButton").getChild("btnBottom").props.enabled = hasFreezed
		self.parent.getChild("cntButton").getChild("btnSave").props.enabled = hasFreezed
		self.parent.getChild("cntButton").getChild("btnHold").props.enabled = hasFreezed
#		system.perspective.print(' btnFreeze .props.text '+str(self.parent.getChild("cntButton").getChild("btnFreeze").props.text = 'Freeze'))
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Order Management/cntSequenced'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Order/OrderManagement')  
		errorFunction = str('tbl.Message Handler  -> UpdateButtons')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

# implement your handler here
	system.perspective.print("calling message handler from OrderRefreshOrderMgmt in OrderMgmt")
	self.custom.refresh = True
	system.perspective.print('refreash binding '+str(self.refreshBinding("props.data")))
	self.custom.selectedId = []

config.script:
"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: Freeze/Unfreeze all orders. 
	"""
	#Start of try block	
	try:
		newOrderStatus = 0
		prevOrderStatus = 0
		if str(self.props.text) == "Lock":
			newOrderStatus = 3
			prevOrderStatus = 2
			self.getSibling("btnFreeze").props.text = 'UnLock'
			self.props.text = 'UnLock'
			system.tag.writeAsync("[default]Order/OrderLock", [True])
			system.perspective.print("Current value true:")
			
			self.getSibling("btnUp").props.enabled = True
			self.getSibling("btnDown").props.enabled = True
			self.getSibling("btnTop").props.enabled = True
			self.getSibling("btnBottom").props.enabled = True
			self.getSibling("btnSave").props.enabled = True
			self.getSibling("btnHold").props.enabled = True
		else: 
			self.getSibling("btnFreeze").props.text = 'Lock'
			self.props.text = 'Lock'
			system.tag.writeAsync("[default]Order/OrderLock", [False])
			newOrderStatus = 2
			prevOrderStatus = 3
			self.getSibling("btnUp").props.enabled = False
			self.getSibling("btnDown").props.enabled = False
			self.getSibling("btnTop").props.enabled = False
			self.getSibling("btnBottom").props.enabled = False
			self.getSibling("btnSave").props.enabled = False
			self.getSibling("btnHold").props.enabled = False
		system.perspective.print('new_order_status_id '+str(newOrderStatus)+' prevOrderStatus '+str(prevOrderStatus))
		AreaID = self.parent.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntArea").getChild("drpArea").props.value
		params = {"OrderStatus": int(newOrderStatus),"PrevOrder":int(prevOrderStatus),"AreaID":AreaID}
		system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Order/updateOrderStatus_Freeze",params)
		system.perspective.sendMessage('refreshSequencedOrders')
#		system.perspective.sendMessage('UpdateButtons')
#		system.perspective.sendMessage("RefreshWashingMachineData", scope = "session")
#		system.perspective.sendMessage("RefreshWashingMachineData", scope = "page")
#		system.perspective.sendMessage("WashineMachineTableRefresh", scope = "view")
		project=system.util.getProjectName()
		messageHandler = "RefreshData"
		system.util.sendMessage(project, messageHandler, scope="S")
		system.perspective.print("Message handler call")
	
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Order Management'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Order/OrderManagement')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:ActionPerformed  -> btnFreeze')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
#		system.perspective.print(str(screenName)+str(errorFunction)+str(errorType)+str(errorCode)+str(description)+str(lineNumber))

"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: Put selected orders in held state. 
	"""
#Start of try block	
	try:
		Ids = self.parent.parent.getChild("tblOrder").custom.selectedId
		
		# Define the new order status ID and user ID
		new_order_status_id = 5
		userId = self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
		
		# Check if userId is None or 'none', and set to 0 if true
		if str(userId).lower() == 'none':
		    userId = 0
		
		# Iterate through the list of Order IDs
		for Id in Ids:
		    # Prepare the parameters for the Named Query
		    params = {"Id": Id, "OrderStatus": new_order_status_id, "UserId": userId}
		
		    # Run the Named Query with the parameters
		    system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Order/updateOrderStatus_Hold", params)

		self.parent.parent.getChild("tblOrder").custom.selectedId  = []
		system.perspective.sendMessage('refreshSequencedOrders')
		system.perspective.sendMessage('updateCheckBox')
#		system.perspective.sendMessage("WashineMachineTableRefresh", scope = "session")
#		system.perspective.sendMessage("WashineMachineTableRefresh", scope = "page")
		project=system.util.getProjectName()
		messageHandler = "RefreshData"
		system.util.sendMessage(project, messageHandler, scope="S")	
	#End of try block		
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Order Management'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Order/OrderManagement')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:ActionPerformed  -> btnHold')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
#		system.perspective.print(str(screenName)+str(errorFunction)+str(errorType)+str(errorCode)+str(description)+str(lineNumber))

"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: Move up order by one sequence. 
	"""
	try:
		data = self.parent.parent.getChild("tblOrder").props.data
		selection = self.parent.parent.getChild("tblOrder").custom.selection
		newData = self.parent.parent.getChild("tblOrder").props.data	
		
		def getNewRowIndex(newData, rowIndex):
		    newRowIndex = rowIndex - 1
		    if newRowIndex in [0]: 
		        return 1  # Ensure we don't swap with the first row
		    else:
		        destinationGroup = newData.getValueAt(newRowIndex, "group")
		        if destinationGroup is None:
		            pass
		        elif destinationGroup == group:
		            pass
		        else:  # Check the row above the destination row
		            aboveDestinationGroup = newData.getValueAt(newRowIndex - 1, "group")
		            if aboveDestinationGroup == destinationGroup:
		                newRowIndex = getNewRowIndex(newData, newRowIndex)
		    return newRowIndex
		
		for rowIndex in selection:
		    # Ensure we do not attempt to move the first 5 rows
		    if rowIndex == 5:
		        continue
		    
		    newRow = [newData.getValueAt(rowIndex, col) for col in range(newData.getColumnCount())]
		    group = newData.getValueAt(rowIndex, "group")
		    newRowIndex = getNewRowIndex(newData, rowIndex)
		    
		    newData = system.dataset.deleteRow(newData, rowIndex)
		    newData = system.dataset.addRow(newData, newRowIndex, newRow) 
#		newData = table.updateGroups(newData)
		self.parent.parent.getChild("tblOrder").props.data = newData

		

	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Order Management'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Order/OrderManagement')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:ActionPerformed  -> btnUp')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
#		system.perspective.print(str(screenName)+str(errorFunction)+str(errorType)+str(errorCode)+str(description)+str(lineNumber))

"""
			Written By: Sagar Iparkar
			Written Date: 27/05/2024
			Purpose: Move down order by one sequence. 
	"""	


	data = self.parent.parent.getChild("tblOrder").props.data
	selection = self.parent.parent.getChild("tblOrder").custom.selection
	newData = self.parent.parent.getChild("tblOrder").props.data
	
	def getNewRowIndex(newData, rowIndex, group):
	    newRowIndex = rowIndex + 1
	    maxIndex = newData.getRowCount() - 1
	    
	    if newRowIndex > maxIndex:
	        newRowIndex = maxIndex
	    else:
	        destinationGroup = newData.getValueAt(newRowIndex, "group")
	        if destinationGroup is None or destinationGroup == group:
	            pass
	        else:
	            belowDestinationGroup = newData.getValueAt(newRowIndex + 1, "group")
	            if belowDestinationGroup == destinationGroup:
	                newRowIndex = getNewRowIndex(newData, newRowIndex, group)
	                
	    return newRowIndex
	
	# Process each selected row to move it down
	for rowIndex in sorted(selection, reverse=True):
	    # Skip the first row to keep it constant
	    if rowIndex == 0:
	        continue
	        
	    newRow = [newData.getValueAt(rowIndex, col) for col in range(newData.getColumnCount())]
	    group = newData.getValueAt(rowIndex, "group")
	    newRowIndex = getNewRowIndex(newData, rowIndex, group)
	    
	    newData = system.dataset.deleteRow(newData, rowIndex)
	    newData = system.dataset.addRow(newData, newRowIndex, newRow)
	
	# Update the table data
	self.parent.parent.getChild("tblOrder").props.data = newData

system.perspective.openPopup("#changeSeq_CR", "Project_VECV/Order/changeSeq",params={"len":len(system.dataset.toPyDataSet(self.parent.parent.getChild("tblOrder").props.data)),"type": "moveUp"},resizable=False,modal=True)

messageHandlers.script:
# implement your handler here
	"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: Move up order by one sequence. 
	"""
	try:
		data = self.parent.parent.getChild("tblOrder").props.data
		selection = self.parent.parent.getChild("tblOrder").custom.selection
		newData = data
		
		def getNewRowIndex(newData, rowIndex, targetSrNo):
		    newRowIndex = rowIndex - 1
		    if newRowIndex < 0: 
		        return 0  # Ensure we don't go below the first row
		    destinationSrNo = newData.getValueAt(newRowIndex, "SrNo")
		    if destinationSrNo == targetSrNo:
		        return newRowIndex  # Target SrNo already found
		    group = newData.getValueAt(rowIndex, "group")
		    destinationGroup = newData.getValueAt(newRowIndex, "group")
		    if destinationGroup is None or destinationGroup == group:
		        return getNewRowIndex(newData, newRowIndex, targetSrNo)  # Check further up
		    return newRowIndex
		
		# Assuming targetSrNo is defined somewhere in your code
		targetSrNo = payload['target'] # Replace with the actual target SrNo
		
		for rowIndex in selection:
		    if rowIndex == 0:
		        continue
		    elif targetSrNo >= rowIndex + 1:
		        continue
		    system.perspective.print("In moveUp msg targetSrNo %s and rowIndex %s"%(targetSrNo,rowIndex))
		    newRow = [newData.getValueAt(rowIndex, col) for col in range(newData.getColumnCount())]
		    group = newData.getValueAt(rowIndex, "group")
		    newRowIndex = getNewRowIndex(newData, rowIndex, targetSrNo)
		    
		    newData = system.dataset.deleteRow(newData, rowIndex)
		    newData = system.dataset.addRow(newData, newRowIndex, newRow)
		
		system.perspective.print("In moveUp" )
		self.parent.parent.getChild("tblOrder").props.data = newData

		system.perspective.sendMessage("saveOrder", scope="page")

	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Order Management'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Order/OrderManagement')  
		errorFunction = str('Message handler  -> moveUp')

config.script: system.perspective.openPopup("#changeSeq_CR", "Project_VECV/Order/changeSeq",params={"len":len(system.dataset.toPyDataSet(self.parent.parent.getChild("tblOrder").props.data)),"type": "moveDown"},resizable=False,modal=True)

messageHandlers.script:
data = self.parent.parent.getChild("tblOrder").props.data
	selection = self.parent.parent.getChild("tblOrder").custom.selection
	newData = data
	
	def getNewRowIndex(newData, rowIndex, targetSrNo):
	    newRowIndex = rowIndex + 1
	    maxIndex = newData.getRowCount() - 1
	
	    if newRowIndex > maxIndex:
	        return maxIndex  # Don't go beyond the last row
	    
	    destinationSrNo = newData.getValueAt(newRowIndex, "SrNo")
	    if destinationSrNo == targetSrNo:
	        return newRowIndex  # Found the target SrNo
	    
	    group = newData.getValueAt(rowIndex, "group")
	    destinationGroup = newData.getValueAt(newRowIndex, "group")
	
	    if destinationGroup is None or destinationGroup == group:
	        return getNewRowIndex(newData, newRowIndex, targetSrNo)  # Continue checking downwards
	    
	    return newRowIndex
	
	# Define your target SrNo here
	targetSrNo = payload['target'] # Replace with the actual target SrNo
	
	# Process each selected row to move it down
	# Sort selection in descending order to avoid index issues
	for rowIndex in sorted(selection, reverse=True):
	    if rowIndex == 0:
	        continue
	    elif targetSrNo <= rowIndex + 1:
	        continue
	    
	    system.perspective.print("In moveUp msg targetSrNo %s and rowIndex %s"%(targetSrNo,rowIndex))
	    newRow = [newData.getValueAt(rowIndex, col) for col in range(newData.getColumnCount())]
	    group = newData.getValueAt(rowIndex, "group")
	    newRowIndex = getNewRowIndex(newData, rowIndex, targetSrNo)
	
	    # Delete the row and add it back at the new index
	    newData = system.dataset.deleteRow(newData, rowIndex)
	    newData = system.dataset.addRow(newData, newRowIndex, newRow)
	
	# Update the table data
	self.parent.parent.getChild("tblOrder").props.data = newData
	system.perspective.sendMessage("saveOrder", scope="page")

config.script:
"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: Save changes in sequence of orders. 
	"""
# Get the table data
	try:
		newData = self.parent.parent.getChild("tblOrder").props.data
		self.getSibling("btnFreeze").props.text = 'Lock'
		system.tag.writeAsync("[default]Order/OrderLock", [False])
		# Print the length of the data for debugging
		system.perspective.print('data len ' + str(newData.rowCount))
		
		userId = self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
		
		if str(userId).lower() == 'none':
		    userId = 0
		
		psn = []  # Initialize an empty list for PSN values
		idList = []  # Initialize an empty list for IDs
		
		for row in range(newData.rowCount):
		    Id = newData.getValueAt(row, "id")
		    psn_value = newData.getValueAt(row, "psn")
		    psn.append(int(psn_value))  # Append PSN value to psn list
		    idList.append(int(Id))  # Append ID to idList
		sorted_psn = sorted(psn)
		psnlen = len(sorted_psn)
		idlen = len(idList)
		system.perspective.print('sorted_psn:'+str(sorted_psn)+' idList '+str(idList)+' psnlen '+str(psnlen)+' idlen '+str(idlen)) 
		for i in range(len(idList)):
		    params = {"Id": idList[i], "Index": sorted_psn[i],"UserId":userId}
		    system.perspective.print('Params:'+ str(params))
		    query = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Order/updateSequence", params)
		self.getSibling("btnFreeze").props.text = 'Lock'
		system.tag.writeAsync("[default]Order/OrderLock", [False])
		newOrderStatus = 2
		prevOrderStatus = 3
		self.getSibling("btnUp").props.enabled = False
		self.getSibling("btnDown").props.enabled = False
		self.getSibling("btnTop").props.enabled = False
		self.getSibling("btnBottom").props.enabled = False
		self.getSibling("btnHold").props.enabled = False
		system.perspective.print('new_order_status_id '+str(newOrderStatus)+' prevOrderStatus '+str(prevOrderStatus))
		AreaID = self.parent.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntArea").getChild("drpArea").props.value
		params = {"OrderStatus": int(newOrderStatus),"PrevOrder":int(prevOrderStatus),"AreaID":AreaID}
		system.perspective.print('Params:--->'+ str(params))
		system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Order/updateOrderStatus_Freeze",params)
		system.perspective.sendMessage('refreshSequencedOrders')
#		system.perspective.sendMessage('UpdateButtons')
		self.props.enabled = False
		project=system.util.getProjectName()
		messageHandler = "RefreshData"
		system.util.sendMessage(project, messageHandler, scope="S")

	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Order Management'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Order/OrderManagement')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:ActionPerformed  -> btnSave')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

		    pyData = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(tableData)

messageHandlers.script:
"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: select/deselect order IDs from list. 
	"""
	# implement your handler here
	#start of try block 
	try:
		system.perspective.print("Message handler call--refreshCreatedOrders in rowSelectionCreated msgHandler")
		Id = self.custom.id
		if str(payload['value']) == 'True':
			data = list(self.custom.selectedId)
			if Id not in data:	
				data.append(Id)
				self.custom.selectedId = data
		elif str(payload['value']) == 'False':
			data = list(self.custom.selectedId)
			if Id in data:
			    # Remove the value from the list
			    data.remove(Id)
			    self.custom.selectedId = data
		system.perspective.print('rowSelection message '+str(self.custom.selectedId )+str(payload['value'])+'  '+str(self.custom.id))
		
	#End of try block		
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Order Management'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Order/OrderManagement')  
		errorFunction = str('tbl.Message Handler  -> SrowSelection')

		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description

	"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: Store updated order list with selection in custom dataset. 
	"""
	try:
		scriptName="message handler--UpdateCreatedOrder"
		no=payload['No']
		selRow=payload['SelctedRow']
		selColumn=payload['columnName']
		updateRowResultDs = {selColumn:no}

		dtSet=self.session.custom.dsOrderManagement
		resultpyData = system.dataset.updateRow(dtSet,selRow,updateRowResultDs)	
		ds= system.dataset.toPyDataSet(resultpyData)	
		self.session.custom.dsOrderManagement=ds
		system.perspective.print("UpdateCreatedOrder:%s"%ds[selRow][selColumn])
		system.perspective.print("selection count:%s"%len(ds))
#		system.perspective.sendMessage("refreshCreatedOrders", scope = "page")
	except:
			import sys, os
			errorMessage=scriptName  +' Exception : '+  str(sys.exc_info()[1])
			system.perspective.print(errorMessage)

config.script:
"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: Update orders to sequenced status . 
	"""
	#Start of try block	
	try:
		Ids = self.getSibling("tblCreatedOrders").custom.selectedId
		system.perspective.print("Ids in created tab %s"%Ids)
		new_order_status_id = 2 
		
		# Iterate through the list of OrderNumbers
		for Id  in Ids:
		    # Define the parameters for the named query
			AreaID = self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntArea").getChild("drpArea").props.value
			LineValue = self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntBOMType").getChild("drpArea").props.value
			if LineValue==0:
				LineName="Main Line"
			elif LineValue==1:
				LineName="Drive Head"
			params = {"Id": Id,"OrderStatus": new_order_status_id,"AreaID":AreaID,"LineName":LineName}
			# Execute the named query
			system.perspective.print("params in created orders %s"%params)
			system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Order/updateOrderStatus_Sequence_CR", params)
		if self.getSibling("btnSelectAll").props.text.upper()=="UNSELECT ALL":
			system.perspective.print("Code for Selected All btn")
			# Define the parameters for the named query
			AreaID = self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntArea").getChild("drpArea").props.value
			LineValue = self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntBOMType").getChild("drpArea").props.value
			if LineValue==0:
				LineName="Main Line"
			elif LineValue==1:
				LineName="Drive Head"
			params = {"AreaID":AreaID,"LineName":LineName}
			# Execute the named query
			system.perspective.print("params in created orders for select all btn %s"%params)
			system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Order/updateOrderStatus_Sequence_Allcreated", params)
			self.getSibling("btnSelectAll").props.text="Select All"
#		if len(Ids)> 0 :
#			payload = {'text':'The status of the selected orders has been successfully changed to sequenced.','display':True }
#			system.perspective.sendMessage('popup_View')
		self.getSibling("tblCreatedOrders").custom.selectedId = []
		system.perspective.sendMessage('refreshCreatedOrders')
		system.perspective.sendMessage('updateCheckBox')	
		project=system.util.getProjectName()
		messageHandler = "RefreshData"
		system.util.sendMessage(project, messageHandler, scope="S")	
	#End of try block		
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Order Management'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Order/OrderManagement')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:ActionPerformed  -> SequenceButton')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
#		system.perspective.print(str(screenName)+str(errorFunction)+str(errorType)+str(errorCode)+str(description)+str(lineNumber))

try:
		system.perspective.print(self.props.text.upper())
		if(self.props.text.upper()=='SELECT ALL'):
			
			table = self.getSibling("tblCreatedOrders")
			rowCount = len(table.props.data)
			system.perspective.print('rowCount=%s'%rowCount)
			sa=self.getSibling("tblCreatedOrders").props.columns[8].viewParams.value
			system.perspective.print('sa=%s'%sa)
			
			
			isDHBOM=self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntBOMType").getChild("drpArea").props.value
			system.perspective.print("Onclick select All Button->isDHBOM =%s "%isDHBOM)
			data = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Order/getProductionOrders_ByStatus_Selection", {"OrderStatus":1,'AreaId':self.view.custom.Area,'isDHBOM':isDHBOM,'isElection':'True'})
			pyData = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(data)
			self.session.custom.dsOrderManagement = pyData 
			system.perspective.sendMessage('selfRefreshCreatedOrder')
			self.getSibling("sequenceButton").props.enabled=True
			self.getSibling("btnDelete").props.enabled=True
			self.session.custom.isOrderSelectedAll=1
			#system.perspective.sendMessage('selfRefreshCreatedOrder',scope='Page')
			self.props.text='Unselect All'
		
		else:
			system.perspective.print('Inside Else')
			table = self.getSibling("tblCreatedOrders")
			rowCount = len(table.props.data)
			system.perspective.print('rowCount=%s'%rowCount)
			sa=self.getSibling("tblCreatedOrders").props.columns[8].viewParams.value
			system.perspective.print('sa=%s'%sa)
			
			
			isDHBOM=self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntBOMType").getChild("drpArea").props.value
			system.perspective.print("Onclick Unselect All Button->isDHBOM =%s "%isDHBOM)
			data = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Order/getProductionOrders_ByStatus_Selection", {"OrderStatus":1,'AreaId':self.view.custom.Area,'isDHBOM':isDHBOM,'isElection':'False'})
			pyData = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(data)
			self.session.custom.dsOrderManagement = pyData 
			system.perspective.sendMessage('selfRefreshCreatedOrder')

			self.getSibling("sequenceButton").props.enabled=False
			self.getSibling("btnDelete").props.enabled=False
			self.session.custom.isOrderSelectedAll=0
			
		
	except Exception as e:
		system.perspective.print('Error = %e'%str(e))

"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: Add/Update order from unhold list. 
	"""
# implement your handler here
	#start of try block 
	try:
		Id = self.custom.id
		psn = self.custom.psn
		system.perspective.print("PSN value in rowSelectionHOld:%s"%psn)
		if str(payload['value']) == 'True':
			data = list(self.custom.selectedId)
			dataPsn = list(self.custom.selectedPsn)
			if Id not in data:	
				data.append(Id)
				self.custom.selectedId = data
			if psn not in dataPsn:	
				dataPsn.append(psn)
				self.custom.selectedPsn = dataPsn
		elif str(payload['value']) == 'False':
			data = list(self.custom.selectedId)
			dataPsn = list(self.custom.selectedPsn)
			if Id in data:
			    # Remove the value from the list
			    data.remove(Id)
			    self.custom.selectedId = data
			if psn in dataPsn:
			    # Remove the value from the list
			    dataPsn.remove(psn)
			    self.custom.selectedPsn = dataPsn
		system.perspective.print('rowSelection message '+str(self.custom.selectedId )+str(payload['value'])+' Id '+str(Id)+' self.custom.selectedPsn '+str(self.custom.selectedPsn))
		
	#End of try block		
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Order Management'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Order/OrderManagement')  
		errorFunction = str('tbl.Message Handler  -> rowSelectionHolded')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
#		system.perspective.print(str(screenName)+str(errorFunction)+str(errorType)+str(errorCode)+str(description)+str(lineNumber))

# implement your handler here
	"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: store order status in custom order dataset. 
	"""
	try:
		scriptName="message handler--UpdateHeldOrders"
		no=payload['No']
		selRow=payload['SelctedRow']
		selColumn=payload['columnName']
		updateRowResultDs = {selColumn:no}

		dtSet=self.session.custom.dsHoldedOrder
		resultpyData = system.dataset.updateRow(dtSet,selRow,updateRowResultDs)	
		ds= system.dataset.toPyDataSet(resultpyData)	
		self.session.custom.dsHoldedOrder=ds
		system.perspective.print("UpdateHeldOrders:%s"%ds[selRow][selColumn])
#		system.perspective.sendMessage("refreshCreatedOrders", scope = "page")
	except:
			import sys, os
			errorMessage=scriptName  +' Exception : '+  str(sys.exc_info()[1])
			system.perspective.print(errorMessage)

config.script:
self.getChild("tblHold").props.selection.selectedRow=-1
	self.getChild("tblHold").props.selection.selectedColumn=''

"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: If workorder state in released then show up & down arrows.. 
	"""
	selectedRow = self.props.selection.data
	self.custom.selectedRowIndex = self.props.selection.selectedRow
	for data in	selectedRow:
		if data['Status'] == 'Released':
			self.parent.parent.getChild("cntAction").getChild("imgUp").meta.visible = True
			self.parent.parent.getChild("cntAction").getChild("imgDown").meta.visible = True
			self.custom.selectedRow = selectedRow
		else:
			self.parent.parent.getChild("cntAction").getChild("imgUp").meta.visible = False
			self.parent.parent.getChild("cntAction").getChild("imgDown").meta.visible = False

onChange.script:
"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: Call message handlers based on index value. 
	"""
	try:

		if int(self.props.currentTabIndex) == 0:
			system.perspective.sendMessage('refreshCreatedOrders')
			system.perspective.print('tab change script refreshCreatedOrders')
			self.getChild("cntCreated").getChild("btnSelectAll").props.text='Select All'
		elif int(self.props.currentTabIndex) == 1:	
			system.perspective.print('tab change script refreshSeqOrders')
			system.perspective.sendMessage('refreshSequencedOrders')
		elif int(self.props.currentTabIndex) == 2:
			system.perspective.sendMessage('refreshHoldedOrders')
		elif int(self.props.currentTabIndex) == 3:	
			system.perspective.sendMessage('refreshStartedOrders')
		elif int(self.props.currentTabIndex) == 4:	
			system.perspective.sendMessage('refreshCompletedOrders')
	except: 
		screenName ='Order Management'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Order/OrderManagement')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:tab.changescript  -> Order Management')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

messageHandlers.script:
"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: Show popup message. 
	"""
	# implement your handler here
	system.perspective.print('In Popup')
	self.meta.visible = payload['display']
	#self.props.params.lblValue = payload['text']
	state='success'
	message=payload['text']
	Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
